title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMRailway
description: A railway track or infrastructure element from OpenStreetMap tagged with the railway key. Covers all types of rail infrastructure, from mainline heavy rail to trams, subways and funiculars.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMRailway

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element.

railwayType.description: Property. The OSM railway tag value that classifies the type of rail infrastructure. Enum:'rail, subway, tram, light_rail, narrow_gauge, monorail, funicular, miniature, preserved, disused, abandoned, construction, proposed'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:railway'

ref.description: Property. Official line reference number or code. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:ref'

gauge.description: Property. Track gauge in millimetres (distance between the two rails). Units:'mm'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:gauge'

electrified.description: Property. Method of electrification of the railway. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:electrified'

voltage.description: Property. Electrical voltage used for traction in Volts. Units:'V'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:voltage'

frequency.description: Property. Electrical frequency of the traction current in Hertz. Units:'Hz'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:frequency'

maxSpeed.description: Property. Maximum permitted speed on this track in kilometres per hour. Units:'Km/h'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:maxspeed'

operator.description: Property. Name of the railway operator or company. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:operator'

usage.description: Property. Intended usage of the railway line. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:usage'

service.description: Property. Type of service track, if not part of the main running line. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:service'

bridge.description: Property. Indicates whether this railway segment runs over a bridge. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:bridge'

tunnel.description: Property. Indicates whether this railway segment runs through a tunnel. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:tunnel'

layer.description: Property. Vertical layer relative to other features at the same location. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:layer'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources about this item.
